text: These surroundings exude a peculiar stillness; I am slightly uneasy yet curious. The dim hallways, glass doors, and quiet expanses evoke a contemplative mood. The R+D sign on the wall hints at innovation and knowledge, yet the darkness gives it an air of mystery. I feel as though I am standing on the border between discovery and uncertainty, my thoughts wandering about the work that happens here and the silence that now pervades. It is both isolating and inspiring.
